name: com.kidzdev.unity.text-scroll
description: Animated text for uGUI/TMPro: marquee ticker, credits roll, auto-fit overflow scrolling, and typewriter character reveal. Two independent component families, no shared dependency beyond TMPro.

samples.description: 1920x1080 scene: marquee ticker, credits roll, auto-fit title, and typewriter dialogue box examples. No extra package dependencies beyond TextMeshPro.
